description: A perfect option to go with your fashionable outfits, this brown handbag from yelloe comes with a leather upper and a spacious inner to hold all your essentials.Height: 31 cmWidth: 41 cmDepth: 16 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one main zipped compartment, with a laptop compartment that has a velcro closure and organiser sleeves with a zipped pocketTwo short handles and a long, adjustable strap for carrying ease and styleBuckle design which is woven through loops and has magnetic buttoned closures for styleBranding embossed on the frontCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
